# IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode.fileBased

**Case**

The scanned content will be saved to the specified download directory.

## Declaration

```swift
case fileBased
```

## Constants

- **IKScannerDeviceViewTransferMode.memoryBased**: The scanned data is returned to the delegate as a `NSData` object.

items.description: The scanned data is returned to the delegate as a `NSData` object.
